channel.title: Tts on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Tts on Arrans github.io

item.title: 2noise/ChatTTS
item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern-design LLMs/AI chat framework. Supports Multi AI Providers( OpenAI / Claude 3 / Gemini / Ollama / Bedrock / Azure / Mistral / Perplexity ), Multi-Modals (Vision/TTS) and plugin system. One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT chat application.

item.title: rhasspy/piper
item.description: A fast, local neural text to speech system

item.title: Weilbyte/tiktok-tts
item.description: Generate TikTok Text-to-Speech voices in your browser
